attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT  
  BK_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE_NUM,
  BK_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE_DT,
  BK_AMEX_TRVL_INV_PSNGR_NUM_INT,
  BK_AMX_TRVL_INV_ACTG_BRNCH_NUM,
  BK_AMEX_TRVL_INV_MACHINE_ID,
  AMEX_PNR_LOCATOR_ID,
  AIR_COMPLIANCE_CD,
  REFUND_OR_EXCHANGE_CD,
  AMEX_CUSTOMER_ID,
  TRAVEL_DT,
  TRAVELER_CISCO_WRKR_PARTY_KEY,
  BK_CISCO_TRVL_NW_COMPLIANCE_CD,
  BK_REASON_FOR_TRAVEL_CD,
  FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CD,
  BK_FINANCIAL_DEPT_COMPANY_CD,
  TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD,
  REPORTING_CURRENCY_CD,
  AMEX_GDS_CD,
  AGENCY_CUSTOMER_ID,
  AMEX_TRAVEL_BOOKING_DT,
  INVOICE_PRMRY_PRODUCT_TYPE_CD,
  INVOICE_SCNDRY_PRODUCT_TYPE_CD,
  INVOICE_REPORTING_AMT,
  INVOICE_LOCAL_AMT,
  BASE_FLIGHT_FARE_REPORTING_AMT,
  PUBLISHED_FARE_LOCAL_AMT,
  BOOKING_AGENCY_ID,
  AGNCY_AIR_FARE_CMMSSN_RPTG_AMT,
  BOOKING_AGENT_ID,
  TRAVEL_RETURN_DT,
  COMPLETE_AIR_ITINERARY_DESCR,
  FLIGHT_DOMESTIC_INTL_CD,
  REPORTED_CURRENCY_EXCHANGE_RT,
  FORM_OF_PAYMENT_CD,
  HGHST_AIR_FARE_CMPRSN_RPTG_AMT,
  LWST_AIR_FARE_CMPRSN_RPTG_AMT,
  FARE_SAVINGS_EXCEPTION_CD,
  TRAVEL_INVOICE_BILLING_TYPE_CD,
  TRAVELER_NAME,
  TICKET_PREPAID_FLG,
  TICKET_TYPE_CD,
  SPECIAL_FARE_NUM,
  MAXIMUM_TRANSACTION_INT_NUM,
  TOTAL_TAX_REPORTING_AMT,
  AGENCY_ASSIGNED_VENDOR_NUM,
  MAXIMUM_PASSENGER_NUM_INT,
  INVOICE_TRANSACTION_TICKET_NUM,
  REFUND_ROLE,
  BK_LOCAL_CURRENCY_CD,
  BK_ISSUING_ISO_COUNRY_CD,
  AMEX_TRANSACTION_FEE_TYPE_CD,
  RU_ORIGINAL_TRX_TICKET_NUM,
  RU_ORIGINAL_TRAVEL_INVOICE_DT,
  RU_ORIGINAL_TRAVEL_INVOICE_NUM
FROM $$WORKDB.W_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE  WATI
where 
not exists 
 ( SELECT 1  FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE NATI
    where WATI.BK_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE_NUM  = NATI.BK_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE_NUM
    and WATI.BK_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE_DT  =  NATI.BK_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE_DT
    and WATI.BK_AMEX_TRVL_INV_PSNGR_NUM_INT = NATI.BK_AMEX_TRVL_INV_PSNGR_NUM_INT
    and WATI.BK_AMX_TRVL_INV_ACTG_BRNCH_NUM =  NATI.BK_AMX_TRVL_INV_ACTG_BRNCH_NUM
    and WATI.BK_AMEX_TRVL_INV_MACHINE_ID    =  NATI.BK_AMEX_TRVL_INV_MACHINE_ID
 )
